title: Certificate Management with kubeadm — Choosing an encryption algorithm
text:
kubeadm allows you to choose an encryption algorithm that is used for creating
public and private keys. That can be done by using the
encryptionAlgorithm
field of the
kubeadm configuration:
apiVersion
:
kubeadm.k8s.io/v1beta4
kind
:
ClusterConfiguration
encryptionAlgorithm
:
<ALGORITHM>
<ALGORITHM>
can be one of
RSA-2048
(default),
RSA-3072
,
RSA-4096
or
ECDSA-P256
.
